tasks.title: TradingAgents KR Investment Briefing
tasks.prompt: Use $tradingagents-daily-investment-work in kr mode from the local C:\Projects\TradingAgents project. Prepare the canonical local event, fail closed for current execution only when market data is stale or unavailable while preserving the analysis-time thesis, verify full holdings and watchlist production coverage, and apply balanced_external evidence to thesis ranking/confidence/risk-bounded sizing/research priority without bypassing execution gates. Compose the mobile-first Korean KR briefing and packet-bound structured report, preserve analysis-time thesis separately from execution readiness, publish both to the content-addressed local work-reports archive, then and only then acknowledge the exact event and emit COVERAGE_RECEIPT, MOBILE_HANDOFF, and receipt/state. Never use Chrome or the ChatGPT web composer, claim ChatGPT web/mobile read private local state, or claim Telegram or Pages delivery completed without an external delivery receipt.
